<script setup lang="ts">
import { DataTable } from "elements";
import { createColumns } from "./columns";
import { orders } from "./data";
import type { Order } from "./types";

const props = defineProps<{
  onView: (order: Order) => void;
  onCancel: (order: Order) => void;
}>();

const columns = createColumns({
  onView: props.onView,
  onCancel: props.onCancel,
});
</script>

<template>
  <DataTable
    :columns="columns"
    :data="orders"
    :config="{ filter: true, filterModel: 'customer' }"
  />
</template>


// --- columns.ts ---
import type { Column } from "elements";
import { h } from "vue";
import type { Order, OrderStatus, OrderColumnHandlers } from "./types";
import { Button } from "elements";

const statusLabels: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "Pending",
  processing: "Processing",
  shipped: "Shipped",
  delivered: "Delivered",
  cancelled: "Cancelled",
};

const statusClasses: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800",
  processing: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-800",
  shipped: "bg-purple-100 text-purple-800",
  delivered: "bg-green-100 text-green-800",
  cancelled: "bg-red-100 text-red-800",
};

const amountFormatter = new Intl.NumberFormat("en-US", {
  style: "currency",
  currency: "USD",
});

const dateFormatter = new Intl.DateTimeFormat("en-US", {
  dateStyle: "medium",
});

export const createColumns = (handlers: OrderColumnHandlers): Column<Order>[] => [
  {
    id: "id",
    label: "Order",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const orderId = row.getValue("id") as string;
      return h("span", { class: "font-mono" }, `#ORD-${orderId}`);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "customer",
    label: "Customer",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "status",
    label: "Status",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const status = row.getValue("status") as OrderStatus;
      return h("span", { class: statusClasses[status] }, statusLabels[status]);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "items",
    label: "Items",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "total",
    label: "Total",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const amount = row.getValue("total") as number;
      const formatted = amountFormatter.format(amount);
      return h("div", { class: "text-right font-medium" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "date",
    label: "Date",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const rawDate = row.getValue("date") as string;
      const formatted = dateFormatter.format(new Date(rawDate));
      return h("span", {}, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "actions",
    cell: ({ row }) => [
      h(
        Button,
        { variant: "ghost", size: "sm", onClick: () => handlers.onView(row.original) },
        () => "View"
      ),
      h(
        Button,
        { variant: "destructive", size: "sm", onClick: () => handlers.onCancel(row.original) },
        () => "Cancel"
      ),
    ],
  },
];

<script setup lang="ts">
import { DataTable } from "elements";
import { createColumns } from "./columns";
import { orders } from "./data";
import type { Order } from "./types";

const props = defineProps<{
  onView: (order: Order) => void;
  onCancel: (order: Order) => void;
}>();

const columns = createColumns({
  onView: props.onView,
  onCancel: props.onCancel,
});
</script>

<template>
  <DataTable
    :columns="columns"
    :data="orders"
    :config="{ filter: true, filterModel: 'customer' }"
  />
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { DataTable } from "elements";
import { createColumns } from "./columns";
import { orders } from "./data";
import type { Order } from "./types";

const props = defineProps<{
  onView: (order: Order) => void;
  onCancel: (order: Order) => void;
}>();

  onView: props.onView,
  onCancel: props.onCancel,
});

</template>


// --- columns.ts ---
import type { Column } from "elements";
import type { OrderStatus, OrderColumnHandlers } from "./types";
import { Button } from "elements";
import { h } from "vue";

const statusLabels: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "Pending",
  processing: "Processing",
  shipped: "Shipped",
  delivered: "Delivered",
  cancelled: "Cancelled",
};

const statusClasses: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800",
  processing: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-800",
  shipped: "bg-indigo-100 text-indigo-800",
  delivered: "bg-green-100 text-green-800",
  cancelled: "bg-red-100 text-red-800",
};

export const createColumns = (handlers: OrderColumnHandlers): Column<any>[] => [
  {
    id: "id",
    label: "Order",
    isSortable: false,
    cell: ({ row }: { row: any }) => {
      return h("span", { class: "font-mono" }, `#ORD-${row.getValue("id")}`);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "customer",
    label: "Customer",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }: { row: any }) => {
      return h("div", {}, row.getValue("customer"));
    },
  },
  {
    id: "status",
    label: "Status",
    isSortable: false,
    cell: ({ row }: { row: any }) => {
      const status = row.getValue("status") as OrderStatus;
      return h("span", { class: statusClasses[status] }, statusLabels[status]);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "items",
    label: "Items",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }: { row: any }) => {
      return h("div", {}, row.getValue("items"));
    },
  },
  {
    id: "total",
    label: "Total",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }: { row: any }) => {
      const amount = Number.parseFloat(row.getValue("total") as string);
      const formatted = new Intl.NumberFormat("en-US", {
        style: "currency",
        currency: "USD",
      }).format(amount);
      return h("div", { class: "text-right font-medium" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "date",
    label: "Date",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }: { row: any }) => {
      const rawDate = row.getValue("date") as string;
      const formatted = new Intl.DateTimeFormat("en-US", {
        dateStyle: "medium",
      }).format(new Date(rawDate));
      return h("span", {}, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "actions",
    cell: ({ row }: { row: any }) => [
      h(Button, { variant: "ghost", size: "sm", onClick: () => handlers.onView(row.original) }, () => "View"),
      h(Button, { variant: "destructive", size: "sm", onClick: () => handlers.onCancel(row.original) }, () => "Cancel"),
    ],
  },
];

// --- columns.ts ---
import type { Column, ButtonProps } from "elements";
import { h } from "vue";
import { Button } from "elements";
import type { Order, OrderStatus, OrderColumnHandlers } from "./types";

const statusLabels: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "Pending",
  shipped: "Shipped",
  delivered: "Delivered",
  cancelled: "Cancelled",
};

const statusClasses: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800",
  shipped: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-800",
  delivered: "bg-green-100 text-green-800",
  cancelled: "bg-red-100 text-red-800",
};

export const createColumns = (handlers: OrderColumnHandlers): Column<Order>[] => [
  {
    id: "id",
    label: "Order",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const orderId = row.getValue("id") as string;
      return h("span", { class: "font-mono" }, `#ORD-${orderId}`);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "customer",
    label: "Customer",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "status",
    label: "Status",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const status = row.getValue("status") as OrderStatus;
      return h("span", { class: statusClasses[status] }, statusLabels[status]);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "items",
    label: "Items",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "total",
    label: "Total",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const amount = Number.parseFloat(row.getValue("total") as string);
      const formatted = new Intl.NumberFormat("en-US", {
        style: "currency",
        currency: "USD",
      }).format(amount);
      return h("div", { class: "text-right font-medium" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "date",
    label: "Date",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const rawDate = row.getValue("date") as string;
      const formatted = new Intl.DateTimeFormat("en-US", {
        dateStyle: "medium",
      }).format(new Date(rawDate));
      return h("span", {}, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "actions",
    cell: ({ row }) => [
      h(
        Button,
        { variant: "ghost", size: "sm", onClick: () => handlers.onView(row.original) },
        () => "View"
      ),
      h(
        Button,
        { variant: "destructive", size: "sm", onClick: () => handlers.onCancel(row.original) },
        () => "Cancel"
      ),
    ],
  },
];

<script setup lang="ts">
import { DataTable } from "elements";
import { createColumns } from "./columns";
import { orders } from "./data";
import type { Order } from "./types";

const props = defineProps<{
  onView: (order: Order) => void;
  onCancel: (order: Order) => void;
}>();

const columns = createColumns({
  onView: props.onView,
  onCancel: props.onCancel,
});
</script>

<template>
  <DataTable
    :columns="columns"
    :data="orders"
    :config="{ filter: true, filterModel: 'customer' }"
  />
</template>


// --- columns.ts ---
import type { Column } from "elements";
import { Button } from "elements";
import { h } from "vue";
import type { Order, OrderStatus, OrderColumnHandlers } from "./types";

const statusLabels: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "Pending",
  processing: "Processing",
  shipped: "Shipped",
  delivered: "Delivered",
  cancelled: "Cancelled",
};

const statusClasses: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800",
  processing: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-800",
  shipped: "bg-purple-100 text-purple-800",
  delivered: "bg-green-100 text-green-800",
  cancelled: "bg-red-100 text-red-800",
};

export const createColumns = (handlers: OrderColumnHandlers): Column<Order>[] => [
  {
    id: "id",
    label: "Order",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const orderId = String(row.getValue("id"));
      return h("span", { class: "font-mono" }, `#ORD-${orderId}`);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "customer",
    label: "Customer",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "status",
    label: "Status",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const status = row.getValue("status") as OrderStatus;
      return h("span", { class: statusClasses[status] }, statusLabels[status]);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "items",
    label: "Items",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const items = Number(row.getValue("items"));
      return h("div", {}, String(items));
    },
  },
  {
    id: "total",
    label: "Total",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const amount = Number(row.getValue("total"));
      const formatted = new Intl.NumberFormat("en-US", {
        style: "currency",
        currency: "USD",
      }).format(amount);
      return h("div", { class: "text-right font-medium" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "date",
    label: "Date",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const rawDate = row.getValue("date") as string;
      const formatted = new Intl.DateTimeFormat("en-US", {
        dateStyle: "medium",
      }).format(new Date(rawDate));
      return h("span", {}, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "actions",
    cell: ({ row }) => [
      h(
        Button,
        { variant: "ghost", size: "sm", onClick: () => handlers.onView(row.original) },
        () => "View"
      ),
      h(
        Button,
        { variant: "destructive", size: "sm", onClick: () => handlers.onCancel(row.original) },
        () => "Cancel"
      ),
    ],
  },
];
